zh.Bourbon-L'Archambault,03036,Allier,Auver: 法國奧維-o-阿爾培斯阿利也布爾波-利阿哈波奧爾特
zh.lifeSummary: 當Archambaud VIII de BOURBON於1140年6月29日出生在法國奧維-o-阿爾培斯阿利也布爾波-利阿哈波奧爾特時，他的父親Archambaud de BOURBON VII29歲，母親Agnes de Savoie37歲。他於大約1164年與Alix de Bourgogne結婚。他們至少是2個女兒的父母。他去世於1169年7月26日在法國布格-福朗-可特艾薩o-吉洛易布爾波-藍希享年29歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: BOURBON
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French: habitational name from a village in Allier, the site of the (now ruined) castle of Bourbon, or from another place called (Le) Bourbon, mainly in the southern part of France. The placename is derived from a Celtic and pre-Celtic element borb- denoting a hot spring.

History: The progenitor of a large part of the American bearers of the surname Bourbon was Jean-Pierre Bourbon from Salins-les-Bains in Jura, France, who settled in MO in the middle of the 19th century. However, many bearers of the surname claim a connection with the house of Bourbon, which provided generations of monarchs of France and Spain and other European royalty. It takes its name from the castle of Bourbon in Allier, which was held by Adhémar, a 9th-century noble. His descendant Beatrice, heiress of Bourbon, married Robert of Clermont, 6th son of King Louis IX of France, in 1272, and these two are considered founders of the royal house. Robert's son Louis was created Duke of Bourbon in 1327. By the 16th century they had added much of southern France, the dukedom of Vendôme, and the kingdom of Navarre to their fiefs, and in 1589 a Bourbon succeeded to the throne of France as Henry IV. His grandson, Louis XIV, called ‘the Sun King’, reigned 1643–1715, presiding over a golden age of French literature and art and attempting to establish French supremacy in Europe. The Bourbons ruled France until the Revolution in 1793 and again 1815–48. The present claimants to the French throne are descended from Louis XIV's brother, Philippe, Duke of Orléans. The Bourbons acquired the Spanish throne in 1700, when a grandson of Louis XIV succeeded as Philip V; they ruled until 1931 and were restored, in the person of King Juan Carlos, in 1975. The Bourbon kings of the Two Sicilies (i.e. Sicily and Naples), 1759–1861, and Bourbon dukes of Parma, 1748–1860, were descended from the Spanish branch of the family.

variants.name: Borbon
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Ana, Jesus, Marta, Miguel Angel, Tomas, Ademar, Alfredo, Ana Maria, Bernabe, Berta, Carlos.

nameMeanings.name: VIII
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Feminine pet form of   Vivien   and   Vivian .

variants.name: Vivien
meanings: Earlier generally taken as a variant of the boy's name Vivian , but now also rarely used for boys. This spelling was quite common in Old French. Its use as a girl's name in the English-speaking world was influenced by Tennyson's Merlin and Vivien ( 1859 ). This name, from Arthurian legend, may represent an altered form of a Celtic name (perhaps akin to the Irish Gaelic name Béibhinn ‘white lady’, pronounced ‘bee-veen’). The actress Vivien Leigh ( 1913–67 ) was christened Vivian.

variants.name: Vivian
meanings: Originally a boy's name, from an Old French form of the Latin name Vivianus (probably a derivative of vivus ‘alive’), but now more frequent as a girl's name. The name was borne by a 5th-century bishop of Saintes in western France, remembered for protecting his people during the invasion of the Visigoths.

en.lifeSummary: When Archambaud VIII de BOURBON was born on 29 June 1140, in Bourbon-l'Archambault, Allier, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, France, his father, Archambaud de BOURBON VII, was 29 and his mother, Agnes de Savoie, was 37. He married Alix de Bourgogne about 1164. They were the parents of at least 2 daughters. He died on 26 July 1169, in Bourbon-Lancy, Saône-et-Loire, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, France, at the age of 29.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Archambaud VIII de BOURBON est né le 29 juin 1140, à Bourbon-l'Archambault, Allier, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, France, son père, Archambaud de BOURBON VII, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Agnes de Savoie, avait 37 ans. Il a épousé Alix de Bourgogne environ 1164. Ils ont eu au moins 2 filles. Il est décédé le 26 juillet 1169, à Bourbon-Lancy, Saône-et-Loire, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, France, à l’âge de 29 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Archambaud VIII de BOURBON am 29. Juni 1140 in Bourbon-l'Archambault, Allier, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Archambaud de BOURBON VII 29 und seine Mutter Agnes de Savoie 37. Er hat um 1164 Alix de Bourgogne geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Töchter. Er starb am 26. Juli 1169 im Alter von 29 Jahren in Bourbon-Lancy, Saône-et-Loire, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Archambaud VIII de BOURBON è nato il il 29 giugno 1140 nel Bourbon-l'Archambault, Allier, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Francia, il suo padre, Archambaud de BOURBON VII, aveva 29 anni e il suo madre, Agnes de Savoie, aveva 37 anni. Lui sposato Alix de Bourgogne circa 1164. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figlie. Morì il 26 luglio 1169, nel Bourbon-Lancy, Saône-et-Loire, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Francia, all'età di 29 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Archambaud VIII de BOURBONが1140年6月29日にフランスアウバーグネ-ルhoネ-アルペスアリールボウルボン-ル'アルチャンバウルトで生まれた時，父Archambaud de BOURBON VIIは29歳，母Agnes de Savoieは37歳であった。約1164年にAlix de Bourgogneと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の娘の親であった。彼は1169年7月26日にフランスボウルゴグネ-フランチェ-コムトeサoネ-エト-ロイアーボウルボン-ランシで29歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Archambaud VIII de BOURBON(이)가 1140년 6월 29일 프랑스 오버그니-ho니-알프스 앨리어 부르보-'아르챔바트에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Archambaud de BOURBON VII(은)는 29세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnes de Savoie(은)는 37세였다. 그는 대략 1164년 Alix de Bourgogne(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1169년 7월 26일 프랑스 부르고그니-프랭체-코트e 사o니-트-로이르 부르보-랭시에서 29세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.29 JUN 1140–26 JUL 1169: 29 de junho de 1140–26 de julho de 1169
pt.1130/1137: de 8 de janeiro de 1130 a 7 de janeiro de 1138
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Archambaud VIII de BOURBON nasceu em 29 de junho de 1140, em Bourbon-l'Archambault, Allier, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, França, seu pai, Archambaud de BOURBON VII, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Agnes de Savoie, tinha 37 anos. Ele casou-se com Alix de Bourgogne aproximadamente 1164. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 26 de julho de 1169, em Bourbon-Lancy, Saône-et-Loire, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, França, com 29 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Archambaud VIII de BOURBON родился 29 июня 1140 г. в местности бурбон-л'арчамбаулт, аллиир, аувиргне-рoне-алпесь, Франция, его отцу по имени Archambaud de BOURBON VII было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes de Savoie, 37. Он женился на женщине по имени Alix de Bourgogne около 1164 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 дочери. Он умер 26 июля 1169 г. в местности бурбон-ланси, саoне-ет-лоир, бургогне-фрэнче-комтe, Франция в возрасте 29 лет.

Se casó con Alix de Bourgogne aproximadamente 1164. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijas.
